case_title: NAZARENO, RICO et al vs. DOE, JOHN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NAZARENO, RICO NAZARENO, ERLINDA AS TO DEFENDANT DOE, JOHN DOE, RICHARD DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-20-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-23-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-30-1993

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-20-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON OCT-20-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR NOV-19-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-19-1993, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON NOV-19-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-20-1993 CONTINUED FROM NOV-19-1993 TO DEC-20-1993 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-20-1993, OFF CALENDAR
